english: O divine Mother, O divine Mother, O divine Mother — salutations

hindi: जय जय माता जय जय माता, सर्वजगत्माता नमो नमः॥
english: Victory Mother, victory Mother, Mother of all the universe — salutations
roman: Jaya jaya mata jaya jaya mata sarva jagat mata namo namah

hindi: चण्डि चण्डि चण्डिके, चण्डिके नमो नमः।
english: O Chandi, Chandi, Chandike, Chandike — salutations
roman: Chandi Chandi Chandike Chandike namo namah

english: O Durga, Durga, remover of misfortune — salutations to the remover of misfortune
roman: Durge Durge durgati harini durgati harini namah

english: Salutations to Mahalakshmi, Mahakali and Mahasaraswati
O Goddess of three powers, O divine Mother of the world — salutations
roman: Tri shakti rupe Bhagavati Jagat mata namo namah

english: Whoever reads this Bhagavati Stotram with devotion
roman: Bhagavati stotram idam yah pathed bhakti man narah

english: By the grace of the great Shakti attains all perfections
roman: Maha shakteh prasadena sarva siddhi mavapnuyat
